evidence: risks associated with our continued integration of artificial intelligence and machine learning within our technology systems

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No named AI programs, dollar amounts, headcount, or quantified resource commitments disclosed in excerpts; only passing references to ongoing integration and competitive risk.
ai_narrative_concreteness: No named AI initiatives or deployed use cases described; AI references are framed primarily as risk factors and competitive concerns rather than strategic programs.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Governance mechanisms (Audit Committee oversight, quarterly updates, AI education) and company-specific risk scenarios (inaccurate/biased AI outputs harming operations) are described, but no quantification of AI risk exposure is provided, limiting score to 4.
